meaning: logical actor index loop starts at 9
load visible object handle for logical actor X
load leader/player current Y/depth candidate, slot0 of $157D array
bias into person/depth sort key band
if computed >= 0x30 keep it for next threshold
if computed < 0x30, force to middle/person band 0x38
if computed >= 0x40, force to high/front band 0x48
pass object handle to AFEC; AFEC internally adds +2 to physical slot
reorder existing object by new sort key in A
